sourcesContent:
const books = [
  // Arundhati Roy
  {
    id: 1,
    title: "The God of Small Things",
    author: "Arundhati Roy",
    price: 499,
    category: "Fiction",
    description: "A multigenerational family saga set in Kerala"
  },

  // Amish
  {
    id: 2,
    title: "The Immortals of Meluha",
    author: "Amish",
    price: 349,
    category: "Fantasy",
    description: "First book of Shiva Trilogy"
  },
  {
    id: 3,
    title: "The Secret of the Nagas",
    author: "Amish",
    price: 349,
    category: "Fantasy",
    description: "Second book of Shiva Trilogy"
  },
  {
    id: 4,
    title: "The Oath of the Vayuputras",
    author: "Amish",
    price: 349,
    category: "Fantasy",
    description: "Third book of Shiva Trilogy"
  },
  {
    id: 5,
    title: "Raavan: Enemy of Aryavarta",
    author: "Amish",
    price: 349,
    category: "Fantasy",
    description: "Ramayana from Raavan's perspective"
  },
  {
    id: 6,
    title: "Sita: Warrior of Mithila",
    author: "Amish",
    price: 349,
    category: "Fantasy",
    description: "Ramayana from Sita's perspective"
  },

  // Chetan Bhagat
  {
    id: 7,
    title: "Five Point Someone",
    author: "Chetan Bhagat",
    price: 299,
    category: "Fiction",
    description: "IIT student life drama"
  },
  {
    id: 8,
    title: "Two States",
    author: "Chetan Bhagat",
    price: 299,
    category: "Romance",
    description: "Love story across Indian states"
  },
  {
    id: 9,
    title: "The 3 Mistakes of My Life",
    author: "Chetan Bhagat",
    price: 299,
    category: "Fiction",
    description: "Friendship and life lessons"
  },
  {
    id: 10,
    title: "Half Girlfriend",
    author: "Chetan Bhagat",
    price: 299,
    category: "Romance",
    description: "Story of ambiguity in love"
  },
  {
    id: 11,
    title: "One Indian Girl",
    author: "Chetan Bhagat",
    price: 299,
    category: "Fiction",
    description: "Modern woman's life journey"
  },
  {
    id: 12,
    title: "Angry Indian Goddesses",
    author: "Chetan Bhagat",
    price: 349,
    category: "Fiction",
    description: "Women empowerment drama"
  },

  // Ruskin Bond
  {
    id: 13,
    title: "The Room on the Roof",
    author: "Ruskin Bond",
    price: 199,
    category: "Fiction",
    description: "Coming of age in colonial India"
  },
  {
    id: 14,
    title: "A Flight of Pigeons",
    author: "Ruskin Bond",
    price: 199,
    category: "Fiction",
    description: "Historical romance during rebellion"
  },
  {
    id: 15,
    title: "The Blue Umbrella",
    author: "Ruskin Bond",
    price: 199,
    category: "Children",
    description: "Children's adventure tale"
  },
  {
    id: 16,
    title: "Tales from the Himalaya",
    author: "Ruskin Bond",
    price: 299,
    category: "Fiction",
    description: "Stories set in the mountains"
  },
  {
    id: 17,
    title: "Our Trees Still Grow in Dehra",
    author: "Ruskin Bond",
    price: 249,
    category: "Poetry",
    description: "Poetry and prose collection"
  },
  {
    id: 18,
    title: "The Eyes of Buddha",
    author: "Ruskin Bond",
    price: 299,
    category: "Fiction",
    description: "Adventure in exotic lands"
  },

  // Additional Indian Authors
  {
    id: 19,
    title: "Munnadi",
    author: "R.K. Narayan",
    price: 349,
    category: "Fiction",
    description: "Tales from Malgudi"
  },
  {
    id: 20,
    title: "The Inheritance of Loss",
    author: "Kiran Desai",
    price: 399,
    category: "Fiction",
    description: "Stories of displacement and loss"
  },
  {
    id: 21,
    title: "Midnight's Children",
    author: "Salman Rushdie",
    price: 599,
    category: "Fiction",
    description: "Magical realism of India"
  },
  {
    id: 22,
    title: "The White Tiger",
    author: "Aravind Adiga",
    price: 399,
    category: "Fiction",
    description: "Dark comedy of transformation"
  },
  {
    id: 23,
    title: "A Suitable Boy",
    author: "Vikram Seth",
    price: 799,
    category: "Fiction",
    description: "Epic family saga of independent India"
  },
  {
    id: 24,
    title: "The God of Small Things",
    author: "Arundhati Roy",
    price: 499,
    category: "Fiction",
    description: "Kerala backwaters narrative"
  },
  {
    id: 25,
    title: "The Goldfinch",
    author: "Donna Tartt",
    price: 649,
    category: "Fiction",
    description: "Art and obsession"
  }
];

export default books;
